parallelization: Phases 1 and 2 can be deployed simultaneously if chunk JSON + sidecar JSON ready.
Phase 4 can be deployed immediately after Phase 2 (no dependency).
Phase 3 is optional and can be deferred.

rollback_plan.phase_2: Revert two commits (helper + call site). Delete bucket files: ssss/brain_full/*.json. Prompts revert to no sidecar context.
rollback_plan.phase_4: Revert analysis branch conditional (4-6 line revert). Analytical workflows no longer injected.
rollback_plan.phase_3: Revert optional section_number extraction (1-2 line revert). Ledger defaults to confidence: medium. No bucket rollback.
rollback_plan.phase_1: Delete bucket files: ssss/SBC*_canonical_chunks.json. Queries revert to existing fallback path (structured tables only). No code revert needed.
rollback_plan.complete: Delete bucket files: ssss/SBC*_canonical_chunks.json + ssss/brain_full/*. Revert four commits in order (Phase 4 => Phase 3 => Phase 2 => Phase 1). Verify: git log --oneline shows no 'brain' commits. Re-deploy edge function.

main_behavior: PRIMARY mode: ZERO changes. Zero corpus load, zero sidecar injection. No regression risk.
advisory_behavior: STANDARD mode: Phase 1 canonical chunks retrieved by existing keyword path (no code change). Phase 2 relations/facts injected as non-citable reasoning aids (26-30 LOC). Buffered streaming path unchanged. Citation verifier auto-downgrades sidecar citations to conf:low; frontend shows faded.

risks.title: Chunk JSON format incompatibility with extractAndScoreChunks
risks.mitigation: Pre-upload validation: test 5 sample chunks against parser; confirm score > 0 for Group M keywords.

risks.title: section_number mismatch with verbatim heading
risks.mitigation: Automated extraction with confidence:low; manual review before upload. Evidence Ledger downgrades if no match.

risks.title: Sidecar citation leakage (model tries to cite relations as law)
risks.mitigation: Explicit [NOT CITABLE - REASONING AID ONLY] header; verifyAdvisoryCitations auto-downgrades to conf:low; frontend fades unsupported sources.

risks.title: Domain trigger false positives (sidecar loads on irrelevant queries)
risks.mitigation: Narrow trigger regex to specific phrases (occupancy classification, sprinkler, alarm, egress). Add secondary occupancy-group check.

risks.title: Bucket naming inconsistency (Phase 2 files not found)
risks.mitigation: Document naming convention in ticket; test discovery before production upload.

risks.title: Primary mode performance regression from sidecar check
risks.mitigation: Gate on mode === 'primary' at line 1 of loadBrainFullSidecars; returns empty immediately. Zero overhead.

risks.title: Buffered Advisory streaming corruption from prompt injection
risks.mitigation: Sidecars prepended BEFORE streaming starts (line 5200, before mode === 'standard' branch). Verifier sees only the model's streamed output; sidecars are not in ledger.

auditor: SUB-AGENT H — Live Integration Design Auditor

phases.expected_analytical_change: No change in Phase 2; Phase 4 will extend to analytical workflows
phases.rollback: revert two commits; delete bucket files

phases.expected_advisory_change: If section_number matches verbatim heading, Evidence Ledger sets sectionConfidence: high

Future DB / Vector / GraphRAG
phases.expected_advisory_change: 5A: chunks migrated to sbc_code_tables; vector embedding feasible. 5B: GraphRAG layer added for transitive closure. 5C: Real-time schema versioning.

deployment_sequence: Phase 1 (days 1-2): Upload canonical chunks. Monitor keyword-path retrieval. Zero risk.
Phase 2 (days 3-5): Deploy helper + call site. Test sidecar injection in Advisory. Monitor citation verifier.
Phase 3 (days 6-7, optional): Add section_number extraction. Validate Evidence Ledger.
Phase 4 (days 8-10): Extend to Analytical mode. Test analytical-vision buffered path.

phase_1_prereq: Chunk JSON validated against extractAndScoreChunks parser (5+ test chunks score > 0)
X-SBC-Source-Meta headers include sectionRef and sectionConfidence
No U+00A7 bytes in chunk text or metadata JSON
phase_2_prereq: Helper function signature matches call site (query, mode, supabaseAdmin)
Sidecars prepended with [NOT CITABLE - REASONING AID ONLY] header
Domain triggers include occupancy, mercantile, egress, alarm, sprinkler (case-insensitive)
Primary mode gate verified: no sidecar load for mode === primary
One edge deploy; zero Vercel deploy
phase_4_prereq: Workflows list required-system checks (e.g., 'if mercantile & >1115m2, sprinkler required')
validateAnalyticalReport tested on sample output (downgrades unsupported claims, ignores workflow context)

analytical_behavior: ANALYSIS mode: Phase 1 canonical chunks retrieved (as Advisory). Phase 2+4 analytical workflows injected into page-inventory block. validateAnalyticalReport unchanged; validator ignores workflow context (not Section VIII evidence). Gap-matrix generation improved.
